Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-28 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum ranker shows ELA dominating the leaderboard with a composite score of 95.3, ranking #1 across 700+ tickers. ELA demonstrates exceptional consistency with all four SMA gates passed and remarkable return acceleration—a 1-year return of 354.71% built on a clean ratio progression (5.39x weekly-to-daily, 3.82x monthly-to-weekly) that suggests organic momentum rather than a single spike. The runner-up SITM scores 95+ as well but with more muted outperformance versus benchmarks (vs_spy_1y of 236.72% compared to ELA's 327.06%), indicating ELA's gains are more differentiated from broad market moves. Both tickers pass all SMA filters and show minimal pullback pressure, but ELA's superior bad_spy_score (1.51 vs 2.59) signals it holds up better during market stress, a mark of resilience. The data reflects a narrow field of elite performers: only these two tickers appear to qualify for top-rank momentum status today based on the dashboard criteria.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
